playbook.intent: Status-theater standup → 15-min exception-driven sync sitting on top of an AI-generated pre-brief.
playbook.scope: A distributed product-dev team walks into the 15-minute sync with the AI pre-brief already posted in the channel: yesterday's merges per person, blocked PRs, failing CI jobs, Sentry/Datadog regressions, today's intended focus. Standup runs on exceptions only — what surprises the team, what's blocked, what changed since the brief was generated. No round-robin "yesterday/today/blockers" reading.

success-criteria.criterion: Pre-brief posted before standup time, daily
Exceptions surfaced + assigned in the meeting
Mistake-memory + pattern-memory updated when standup teaches the team something new

stage.name: Generate the pre-brief
stage.intent: AI agent aggregates yesterday's signal into a single channel post before standup.

tasks.task: Pull merges, blocked PRs, CI failures per person
Triage + route stale tickets via tracker AI

stage.decision-gate: Advance to the sync only when the pre-brief is posted. No brief = standup happens but is logged as a process miss.

stage.name: Run the 15-min exception sync
stage.intent: Cover exceptions, blockers, and changes since the brief. Skip everything that's already in the brief.

tasks.task: Each person flags exceptions to the pre-brief only
Surface blockers + assign owners on the spot

stage.decision-gate: End the meeting at 15 minutes regardless. Spill = sign that standup turned into status theater.

stage.name: Feed the memory + close the loop
stage.intent: Patterns and mistakes from today land in memory; not just in heads.

tasks.task: Update mistake-memory with anything that surprised us
Update pattern-memory with anything we want to keep doing
Carry unresolved items to tomorrow's brief

stage.decision-gate: If a real pattern showed up but didn't make it to memory, schedule a 5-min follow-up — don't lose it.

extra.value: ['Replacing 1:1s — standup is sync coordination, not management', Sprint planning — see sprint-planning-sdd-task-expansion, Retros — see biweekly-retro-mistake-memory]
[Tracker (Linear/Jira) wired with AI triage, AI bot with channel-post permission, Documented exception-driven standup protocol agreed by team]

[Pre-brief skipped 'just today' — within a week the brief stops being trusted, Standup expands to 30 min — kills exception-driven discipline, Decisions stay verbal — the next person on-call has no trail, Memory updates skipped — the team stops learning]
['Could a new joiner read yesterday''s brief + decisions thread and be caught up?', 'Did standup end at 15 minutes?', 'Did at least one mistake or pattern land in memory this week?']
{human: faion get-content daily-standup-ai-prebrief --format md, agent: faion get-content daily-standup-ai-prebrief --format context, json: faion get-content daily-standup-ai-prebrief --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
